CustomField.description: This calculates the time between Close Date and Last Open Date.
CustomField.formula:
ROUND( CASE( TEXT(ClosedStatus__c) ,'Converted', Converted_Date__c ,'Abandoned',DATEVALUE(RejectedDate__c) ,'Future Nurturing',DATEVALUE(TurnbackDate__c) , DATEVALUE(fxLastDateOpen__c) ) - DATEVALUE(fxLastDateOpen__c)
,0)
CustomField.inlineHelpText: This calculates the time between Close Date and Last Open Date.
CustomField.label: fxDaysOpenToClose
